data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — 3/4 tests RED (FAIL), 1/4 tests GREEN (test_cache_format_preserved correctly passes since cache-format-reference.md fields are intact). grep -q FAIL AC check passes. run-all.sh unaffected: new .sh file not collected by any suite runner (scripts runner only checks tests/scripts/ and tests/plugin/; Python runner only runs pytest on .py files). Pre-existing 9 Python test failures are unchanged.
